articles.headline: World Cup final squads ranked: Of all 48 national teams, who can win this summer?

keyEvents.text: First Half ends, Cayman Islands 0, Antigua and Barbuda 0.
Second Half begins Cayman Islands 0, Antigua and Barbuda 0.
Substitution, Antigua and Barbuda. TJ Bramble replaces Sean Tomlinson.
Substitution, Antigua and Barbuda. Quinton Griffith replaces Kendukar Challenger.
Substitution, Antigua and Barbuda. Raheem Deterville replaces D'Andre Bishop.
Substitution, Cayman Islands. Joshwa Campbell replaces Jacobbi Tugman.
Substitution, Antigua and Barbuda. Kwame Kirby replaces Javorn Stevens.
Substitution, Cayman Islands. Trey Ebanks replaces Elijah Seymour.
Substitution, Cayman Islands. Immanuel Duran replaces Gunnar Studenthofft.
Substitution, Cayman Islands. Gabrielle Dell’Oglio replaces Jordan Bonilla because of an injury.

Goal!  Cayman Islands 1, Antigua and Barbuda 0. Joshwa Campbell (Cayman Islands) header from the right side of the six yard box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Trey Ebanks with a cross   following a set piece situation.
Substitution, Antigua and Barbuda. Zafique Drew replaces Shavorn Philip.
Zafique Drew (Antigua and Barbuda) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Second Half ends, Cayman Islands 1, Antigua and Barbuda 0.
